---
title: "Laptops_Anova_Two_Factor"
author: "Christine Gonzalez"
date: "2026-05-22"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(car)
library(dplyr)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
library(car)

data <- read.csv("laptops.csv")

lap_data <- filter(data, !Manufacturer %in% c("Samsung", "Huawei", "Razer", "Xiaomi", "MSI"))

lap_data$Manufacturer <- as.factor(lap_data$Manufacturer)
lap_data$Weight_segment <- as.factor(lap_data$Weight_segment)

laptop_lm <- lm(Price ~ lap_data$Manufacturer*lap_data$Weight_segment, data = lap_data)

laptop_model <- Anova(laptop_lm, type = "III")

laptop_model
```
```{r, echo=FALSE}

alias(lm(Price ~ lap_data$Manufacturer*lap_data$Weight_segment, data = lap_data))
```
